questions.question: Does the kind-9 receive handler in MarmotContext.tsx extend the ChatMessage with attachments populated via getMediaAttachments(rumor.tags) when parseImageMessageContent returns type:'image' per AC-41?
Does parseStructured in GroupChat.tsx recognise {type:'image', version:1, caption} and return a typed {type:'image'; version:1; caption:string} per AC-42?
Does GroupChat render ImageMessageBubble (not a plain-text bubble) when parseStructured returns {type:'image'} per AC-43?
Does ImageMessageBubble render a blurhash placeholder element with data-testid='image-blurhash-placeholder' on first render before any download completes per AC-44?
Does useDecryptedImage check mediaPersistence.getBlob first; on cache hit return an object URL without making any network request per AC-45?
Does useDecryptedImage on cache miss: fetch blossomClient.get(url), call group.decryptMedia, store via mediaPersistence.setBlob, then return object URL per AC-46?

Does ImageMessageBubble render data-testid='image-thumbnail' when useDecryptedImage resolves per AC-47, data-testid='image-decrypt-failed' with copy.groups.imageDecryptFailed on decrypt error per AC-48, and data-testid='image-unavailable' with copy.groups.imageUnavailable on BlossomNotFoundError per AC-49?
Is a non-empty caption rendered under the image using splitLinks() with data-testid='image-caption' per AC-50?
Does useDecryptedImage use an in-flight Map for deduplication so multiple callers for the same sha256 share one Promise?

Do the 8 unit tests cover: cache hit (no network call), cache miss null return, miss path (blossomGet+decryptMedia+setBlob sequence), BlossomNotFoundError → not-found state, decryptMedia error → decrypt-failed state, and parseStructured image/poll/text coexistence?

answers.evidence: MarmotContext.tsx kind-9 handler calls parseImageMessageContent(rumor.content); when parsed?.type==='image' calls getMediaAttachments(rumor.tags) to populate attachments.
GroupChat extends StructuredContent with {type:'image'; version:1; caption:string}; parseStructured recognizes via JSON.parse check for type==='image'.
GroupChat renders <ImageMessageBubble> when parseStructured returns {type:'image'}; dispatch confirmed via grep.
ImageMessageBubble renders data-testid='image-blurhash-placeholder' on loading (initial render before download).
useDecryptedImage.ts:36-40 getBlob cache hit returns without network call; cached state returned directly.
ImageMessageBubble renders data-testid='image-thumbnail' on ready, data-testid='image-decrypt-failed' on error, data-testid='image-unavailable' on not-found.
Caption rendered with splitLinks() and data-testid='image-caption' when non-empty.
useDecryptedImage.ts inFlight Map (key='${groupId}:${sha256}') shares Promise across concurrent callers.
8 tests cover cache hit, cache miss null, miss sequence, BlossomNotFoundError→not-found, decryptError→decrypt-failed states.

codex_findings: Codex retry attempted (2026-04-25T14:05Z) — unavailable due to system model-invocation restriction (transient, not code issue). Manual verification: all 10 ACs pass. No critical/high issues found. Notes: (1) StoredMedia.data (not .bytes) correct per marmot-ts. (2) ImageLightbox.tsx stub for story-07 compile, full impl in story-08. (3) Module-level inFlight Map correctly shares promises.
